text: Standing within these reflective corridors and vibrant R&D spaces, I feel like an explorer on the edge of the unknown—caught between sterile observation and colorful speculation. The language of command and navigation—Radial 1, Radial 2—echoes the precision and hierarchy of star-faring vessels, yet here it feels abstract, almost playful. A hush of anticipation and inquiry surrounds me, as if discovery is just a conversation away. I feel alert, curious, slightly dislocated from the ordinary flow of time, and oddly reassured by the shared purpose implicit in zones like these.
